name: Cappuccino-Pistachio Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Dissolve the coffee in water in a medium bowl.
3. Stir in the margarine and powdered sugar until combined.
4. Stir in the flour and pistachios, using your hands if necessary, until a stiff dough forms.
5. Divide the dough into two equal parts.
6. Shape each part into a ball.
7. Pat each ball into a 6-inch round on a lightly floured surface, about 1/2-inch thick.
8. Cut each round into 16 wedges.
9. Arrange the wedges on an ungreased cookie sheet about 1/2 inch apart with the pointed ends toward the center.
10. Bake for about 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Remove from the cookie sheet and cool completely on wire racks.
12. In a small dish, place the remaining pistachios.
13. In a small microwavable bowl, melt the chocolate and shortening uncovered on medium power for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring after 2 minutes until smooth and drizzling consistency.
14. Dip one edge of each cookie into the chocolate, then into the nuts.
15. Place on waxed paper until the chocolate is firm.
